(阪神大賞典, *hanshin daishōten*) is a Japanese [Grade 2](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [colts](/wiki/Colt_(horse) "Colt (horse)") and [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly") aged four and over run over a distance of 3,000 metres at the [Hanshin Racecourse](/wiki/Hanshin_Racecourse "Hanshin Racecourse"), [Takarazuka, Hyogo](/wiki/Takarazuka,_Hyogo "Takarazuka, Hyogo"). The race was run in late November or early December until 1987 when it was moved to a date in March. The race now serves as a trial for the spring edition of the [Tennō Shō](/wiki/Tenn%C5%8D_Sh%C5%8D_(Spring) "Tennō Shō (Spring)").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Hanshin Daishoten](/w/index.php?title=Hanshin_Daishoten&redirect=no "Hanshin Daishoten"))

Horse race

Hanshin Daishōten  
阪神大賞典

|  |  |

The **Hanshin Daishōten** (阪神大賞典, *hanshin daishōten*) is a Japanese [Grade 2](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [colts](/wiki/Colt_(horse) "Colt (horse)") and [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly") aged four and over run over a distance of 3,000 metres at the [Hanshin Racecourse](/wiki/Hanshin_Racecourse "Hanshin Racecourse"), [Takarazuka, Hyogo](/wiki/Takarazuka,_Hyogo "Takarazuka, Hyogo"). The race was run in late November or early December until 1987 when it was moved to a date in March. The race now serves as a trial for the spring edition of the [Tennō Shō](/wiki/Tenn%C5%8D_Sh%C5%8D_(Spring) "Tennō Shō (Spring)").

It was first run in 1953.

## Race details

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hanshin_Daish%C5%8Dten&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Race details")]

The race is run at Hanshin Racecourse over a distance of 3,000 meters on turf using the inner curve.

### Weight

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hanshin_Daish%C5%8Dten&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Weight")]

56 kg for four-year-olds, and 57 kg for five-year-olds and above.[[1]](#cite_note-1)  
*Allowances:*

* 2 kg for [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly") / [mares](/wiki/Mare "Mare")
* 1 kg for [southern hemisphere](/wiki/Southern_Hemisphere "Southern Hemisphere") bred three-year-olds

*Penalties (excluding two-year-old race performance):*

* If a [graded stakes](/wiki/Graded_stakes_race "Graded stakes race") race has been won within a year:
  + 2 kg for a grade 1 win (1 kg for fillies / mares)
  + 1 kg for a grade 2 win
* If a graded stakes race has been won for more than a year:
  + 1 kg for a grade 1 win
